top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China is building launch pads near its nuclear missile silos
top_signals.summary: China’s nuclear missiles can reach any U.S. city. Now, satellite images show Beijing is building a sprawling web of military sites near its nuclear silos.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US stocks post longest weekly winning streak since 2023
top_signals.summary: AI enthusiasm and hopes for deal to extend US-Iran ceasefire boost markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement actions with former employee of Atlantic Union Bank and former employee of Frost Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/04 - BEEDS User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Environment – Statistical Taxonomy v1.3.1 FINAL
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
Texas appoints CleanSpark exec, bitcoin miner CEO to Strategic Bitcoin Reserve committee
top_signals.summary: Texas is seeking a custodian to transition reserve assets from Blackrock's IBIT into direct bitcoin holdings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
